subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon thy Lord, the Most Exalted! There have indeed been sent down unto thee aforetime clear verses, of which a single word sufficeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی ربک المتعال قد نزلت لک من قبل آیات بینات التی تکفی کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
